title: PlatinumMC
description: Platinum is a carefully crafted Minecraft modpack focused on ultimate quality-of-life enhancements, cutting-edge performance optimization, and immersive visual upgrades. Experience smoother gameplay, smarter mechanics, and a stunningly beautiful world.
body:
![Banner for mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/42a19a4770ee5abc6905a054c484b52df2a8c3e7_0.webp)

Platinum is a premium Minecraft experience that blends seamless performance, immersive visuals, and smart quality-of-life improvements into one beautifully refined package. Designed for players who want their world to look better, run smoother, and feel more alive, Platinum elevates the base game without overwhelming it.

Optimized by cutting-edge mods like Sodium, Lithium, and Dynamic FPS, Platinum ensures buttery-smooth framerates even in the most demanding environments. With Iris Shaders, Falling Leaves, Ambient Sounds, and Continuity, every biome becomes a vibrant, living landscape.

Explore expanded worlds powered by YUNG's Better Structures, Dungeons & Taverns, and TerraBlender, offering endless new adventures while preserving the spirit of vanilla Minecraft.
Meanwhile, intuitive enhancements like Waystones, Mouse Tweaks, Right-Click Harvest, and Xaero’s Minimap guarantee a smoother, smarter survival experience.

Platinum includes the Essentials mod, which allows players to play together by directly sharing worlds, eliminating the need for a server.

There are two versions of Platinum available, one compiled for **Forge** compatibility and one for **Fabric**. The two versions differ slightly, especially in terms of performance mods for the client. Both aim to implement the same changes.
